strategy_decisions.rationale: This state-change continuation variant still produced 0 trades on valid data. The mechanism is plausible, but the combined hold and confirmation stack remains too participation-sparse for this SOL 4h transition lane, so it should be aborted rather than cosmetically refined.

The exhaustion mean-reversion idea is coherent, but this SOL 4h lane did not express enough balance-reversion behavior for the chosen setup and it produced 0 trades on valid data. For this exact packet the honest outcome is abort.

The retest-continuation concept is plausible, but the chosen role assignment still made the confirmation stack too restrictive and yielded 0 trades on valid data. For this packet the honest action is abort rather than invented refinement.
